patch:
--- a/priority_encoder.vhd

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 library ieee;
 use ieee.std_logic_1164.all;
 
 architecture rtl of priority_encoder is
 begin
-  process(request_0)
+  process(request_0, request_1, request_2, request_3, request_mask)
   begin
     grant <= "0000";
     if (request_mask = '1') then
